description:
Reconstruct a lost portfolio in JStock using data from a brokerage statement. Create a new portfolio named 'Recovery' and record the following transactions:

1. CASH DEPOSIT: March 01, 2023 | Amount: $25,000.00 | Description: Initial Funding
2. BUY TRANSACTION: March 05, 2023 | Symbol: INTC (Intel Corp) | Units: 500 | Price: $30.50 | Broker Fee: $4.95
3. BUY TRANSACTION: April 10, 2023 | Symbol: AMD (Adv Micro Devices) | Units: 100 | Price: $95.00 | Broker Fee: $4.95
4. DIVIDEND: June 01, 2023 | Symbol: INTC | Amount: $62.50
5. SELL TRANSACTION: August 15, 2023 | Symbol: AMD | Units: 50 | Price: $110.00 | Broker Fee: $4.95
